states.name: declared
states.description: Binding intent exists but compatibility has not been accepted.
entry_requirements: Workspace Revision and Facility Revision are referenced.

states.name: validated
states.description: Binding passed current compatibility/policy validation for its declared scope.
entry_requirements: Validation evidence and expiry are recorded.

states.name: incompatible
states.description: Binding cannot currently materialize the declared Workspace Revision under its constraints.
entry_requirements: Failed/unknown constraints and evidence are retained.

states.name: deprecated
states.description: Binding remains historical or temporarily usable under policy but should not be selected for new ordinary materializations.

states.name: revoked
states.description: Binding can no longer authorize materialization.
entry_requirements: Revocation authority and affected materializations are reconciled.

required_preconditions: Workspace/Facility/provider requirements and policy are recorded.
Compatibility, locality, isolation, capability and policy checks pass.
New materialization is blocked and affected generations are reconciled.
